text.value: The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The source display 'CORRECTED RESULTS' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#C' is not valid. Possible displays: 'Corrected, final', 'korrigiertes Ergebnis, final'

The source display 'NO ORDER ON RECORD' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#Y' is not valid. Possible displays: 'No order on record for this test', 'Kein Auftrag zu dieser Untersuchung'

The source display 'NOT VERIFIED' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#R' is not valid. Possible displays: 'Results stored; not yet verified', 'Ergebnisse gespeichert, aber noch nicht validiert'

The source display 'ORDER CANCELED' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#X' is not valid. Possible displays: 'No results available; Order canceled', 'Keine Ergebnisse - Auftrag storniert'

The source display 'ORDER RECIEVED' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#O' is not valid. Possible displays: 'Order received; specimen not yet received', 'Auftrag erhalten - Probe steht noch aus'

The source display 'PROCEDURE SCHEDULED' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#S' is not valid. Possible displays: 'No results available; procedure scheduled, but not done', 'Keine Ergebnisse - Untersuchung eingeplant, aber noch nicht durchgeführt'

The source display 'SOME RESULTS AVAILABLE' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#A' is not valid. Possible displays: 'Some, but not all, results available', 'einige, aber nicht alle Ergebnisse verfügbar'

The source display 'SPECIMEN RECEIVED' for the code 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0#I' is not valid. Possible displays: 'No results available; specimen received, procedure incomplete', 'Keine Ergebnisse - Probe liegt vor, Untersuchung unvollständig'
Target Code System http://snomed.info/sct is only supported on the terminology server, so the target codes are not validated for performance reasons
Target Code System http://loinc.org is only supported on the terminology server, so the target codes are not validated for performance reasons
The source code '<NULL>' is not valid in the code system http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0123|2.4.0
URL value 'http://hl7.org/fhir/us/carin-bb/CodeSystem/C4BBIdentifierType' does not resolve
Target Code System http://snomed.info/sct is only supported on the terminology server, so the target codes are not validated for performance reasons
Target Code System http://snomed.info/sct is only supported on the terminology server, so the target codes are not validated for performance reasons

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/admit-source'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer. Using version '1.0.0', found versions: 0.1.0, 4.0.1

This SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [Abdomen (body structure), Ankle region structure (body structure), Structure of left ankle (body structure), Structure of right ankle (body structure), Structure of precordium (body structure)] and examples for no FSN: [Arteriovenous fistula (morphologic abnormality)])
